g.text: Bytes 2-14 | bytes[13] | payload = header + column data
Serial Type Codec — type code encodes type AND size (no schema lookup needed)
Code 0 | NULL | 0 data bytes — value is absent
Code 1 | INT8 | 1 byte, big-endian signed <- age=30 uses this
Code 8 | INT 0 | 0 data bytes — value is integer 0
Code 9 | INT 1 | 0 data bytes — value is integer 1
Code N odd N>=13 | TEXT | (N-13)/2 bytes UTF-8 <- name: (23-13)/2=5
Code N even N>=12 | BLOB | (N-12)/2 bytes raw <- city: (19-13)/2=3
Varint Encoding — values <128 fit in 1 byte (high bit = continuation flag)
Value 42 -> 0x2A | 1 byte | rowid (fits in 7 bits: high bit = 0)
Value 128 -> 0x81 0x00 | 2 bytes | continuation bit set on byte 0
Total data = 9 bytes (4 header + 9 data = 13 payload)
